criteria.name: Personalized Learning
criteria.description: Adapts to the individual student's pace and learning style using AI algorithms.

criteria.name: AI-Powered Tutoring
criteria.description: Offers AI-driven support and feedback to students, mimicking a human tutor.

criteria.name: Writing Assistance
criteria.description: Provides AI assistance for writing, including grammar checks, style suggestions, and content generation.

criteria.name: Language Learning
criteria.description: Uses AI to facilitate language acquisition through interactive lessons and personalized feedback.

criteria.name: Real-time Feedback
criteria.description: Delivers immediate assessment and guidance to students, enhancing their learning experience.

criteria.name: Content Generation
criteria.description: The app can generate practice questions, flashcards, and study guides using AI.
